# TheVincis

> TheVincis is a digital product studio whose name means "winning the hearts of the citizens." It builds SaaS products, full-stack web platforms, custom mobile applications, purpose-driven portfolio websites and data analytics systems for tier-2 and tier-3 businesses, and provides SEO, AEO and GEO search-visibility services.

## Core pages

- [TableServe — QR Ordering System](https://thevincis.com/qr-ordering-system/): full product page for TableServe, TheVincis's QR ordering system — how QR table ordering works, what's included, pricing model, TableServe-vs-POS comparison, FAQ.
- [Iyra Money Tracker](https://thevincis.com/iyra-money-tracker/): mobile app (Android, launching soon on Google Play) that logs UPI transactions automatically from payment notifications — budgets, savings rate, cashflow trends and a shared household view. Works with any UPI app; never asks for bank credentials.
- [Web Development](https://thevincis.com/services/web-development/): websites and full-stack platforms for small businesses — what a business website needs, website-vs-platform comparison, process, FAQ.
- [Data Analytics](https://thevincis.com/services/data-analytics/): Power BI and Tableau dashboards for small businesses — what a dashboard answers, Excel-vs-dashboard comparison, process, FAQ.
- [SEO · AEO · GEO](https://thevincis.com/services/seo-aeo-geo/): definitions of SEO, AEO and GEO, why businesses need all three, the monthly service cycle, honest timelines, FAQ.

## Services

- SaaS Product Development: end-to-end software-as-a-service products. Flagship product: TableServe — a contactless QR table-ordering SaaS for restaurants and cafés (scan a QR code, browse a live menu, order reaches the kitchen instantly; no app download).
- Full-Stack Development: complete web platforms (frontend, backend, database, deployment) engineered with DevSecOps discipline.
- Custom Mobile Applications: Android and iOS apps tailored to each business's workflow.
- Purpose-Driven Portfolio Websites: websites built to solve specific business problems (leads, bookings, orders, trust) — not just showpieces.
- Data Analytics & Business Intelligence: dashboards and decision systems built with Python, SQL, Power BI and Tableau.
- SEO, AEO & GEO: Search Engine Optimization, Answer Engine Optimization (featured snippets, voice) and Generative Engine Optimization (visibility inside AI answers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini and Google AI Overviews).

## The Vincis Collective (allied studios)

- CreativzEdge: a graphic design & branding studio allied with TheVincis, with studios in Chennai and Mumbai and 15+ years of design expertise. Two pillars: Design Studio (logo & identity, packaging, social creatives, print & ads, menus, stationery) and Digital Growth (SEO, GEO, AEO, social media). Clients include Padma Shri percussionist Drums Sivamani, Dhara Logistics, SIGAI, DHARANI Cosmetic & Diabetic Centre, 359 Event Planners and Triya Construction.
- Blackfyre (https://blackfyre.tech): an open-source (Apache-2.0) multi-cloud compliance and security platform allied with TheVincis. Scans AWS, Azure and GCP against 678 controls across 9 frameworks (including SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, ISO/IEC 42001, NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5) using 55 automated auditors, with AI-assisted gap analysis, MITRE ATT&CK mapping and a tamper-evident evidence vault (SHA-256, S3 Object Lock WORM, AES-256-GCM). Read-only cloud access only; free to self-host via Docker Compose.

## Founder

Sathyanarayana D — Founder & Principal Engineer. Cybersecurity & IoT graduate with expertise across DevSecOps, data analytics and application development. Works in Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau and Excel; certified by Microsoft and Infosys. Has shipped three end-to-end products and delivered corporate training to 200+ professionals.

## Contact

- Website: https://thevincis.com/
- Email: vincis.contact@gmail.com
- Free consultation available; typical reply within one working day.
